channel.title: .NET on Ronald's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in .NET on Ronald's Blog

item.title: Deep Object Comparison in MSTest with Assert.AreEquivalent
item.description: MSTest v4.3.0 introduces the Assert.AreEquivalent<!-- raw HTML omitted --> method that performs a deep equality comparison of two objects, checking that all properties have the same value. In this post, I’ll show you what it can do and how it compares to AwesomeAssertions and Shouldly.

item.title: Track Availability in Application Insights using .NET
item.description: Standard availability tests in Application Insights have limitations like no multi-step authentication, no mTLS support and no access to private networks. This post shows you how to create custom availability tests using .NET and Azure Functions to overcome these restrictions while gaining full control over your monitoring logic.

item.title: Call OAuth-Protected APIs with Managed Identity from .NET
item.description: Learn how to call OAuth-protected APIs from .NET applications using Azure managed identity. This post shows how to implement secure API calls from Azure Functions without managing secrets, using the Azure Identity library and custom HTTP message handlers.
